reforms.description: A 25 percent credit for incremental research and development costs was introduced to incentivize private sector innovation.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Encourages firms to invest in R&D, leading to increased innovation and productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The tax credit for incremental R&D costs was enacted as part of the Economic Recovery Tax Act.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant policy shift aimed at stimulating private sector R&D investment, which is crucial for long-term economic growth.
reforms.source_quote: A 25 percent credit for incremental research and development costs.
